title: How to get started
subtitle: Your journey to becoming a global educator is simple and transparent.
ctaNote: Sign in now to start your tutor application.
ctaNoteLoggedIn: Continue with the following steps to complete your tutor profile.

signUp.title: Sign up
signUp.description: Create your profile, upload your credentials, and tell us about your expertise.

getApproved.title: Get approved
getApproved.description: Our team reviews your profile to ensure quality and platform fit.

startEarning.title: Start earning
startEarning.description: Accept lesson requests and start sharing your knowledge with students.

setOwnRate.title: Set your own rate
setOwnRate.description: Choose your hourly rate and change it anytime. You are in full control of your business and earnings.

teachAnytime.title: Teach anytime, anywhere
teachAnytime.description: Decide when and how many hours you want to teach. No minimum hours, no fixed schedule. Work from home or on the go.

growProfessionally.title: Grow professionally
growProfessionally.description: Access member webinars, professional development resources, and a supportive community of experienced educators.
